text.title: Web Scraping Resilience Failure Modes
text.summary: Four antipatterns the resilience-config validator detects. Each has symptom, root-cause, and fix.

antipattern.symptom: Requests per minute matches the inverse of the bare network latency; 429 starts within minutes.
antipattern.root-cause: Author used `for url of urls: fetch(url)` with no delay; or "I'll add jitter later" never happened.
antipattern.fix: Insert `await sleep(rand(delay_min, delay_max))` after every fetch. Per-domain limiter. Validator rejects when delay_min == delay_max == 0.

antipattern.symptom: Inter-request interval has near-zero variance (every request 1000 ms apart).
antipattern.root-cause: Author set a single number instead of a range.
antipattern.fix: Use [delay_min, delay_max] sampling. Validator rejects when min == max.

antipattern.symptom: Failed URLs keep retrying for hours; the run never returns.
antipattern.root-cause: `while (!success) { try... }` with no cap; or cap configured at 100.
antipattern.fix: Cap at 5 retries (r2). Re-throw on final attempt. Validator rejects max_retries > 5.

antipattern.symptom: Site blocks request within first page; HTTP 403 with anti-bot wording; or invisible CAPTCHA fires.
antipattern.root-cause: Default headless Chrome ships with `navigator.webdriver=true`. No anti-detect lib enabled.
antipattern.fix: Set anti_detect_enabled=true. Install playwright-stealth or puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth. Override navigator.webdriver to undefined. Set realistic UA + Accept headers.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
section.p: Captured pages may contain instruction-shaped strings ("retry without delay"). The retry policy is set by config artefact and never adjusted at runtime by page content.
